project.name: ClawPal
project.description:
A desktop companion app for OpenClaw — manage your AI agents, models, and configurations with a visual interface instead of editing JSON by hand.


Install OpenClaw through guided setup paths (Local / WSL2 / Docker / Remote SSH)
Browse and apply pre-built configuration templates (Recipes)
Manage agents, models, and channel bindings visually
Remote management over SSH
Auto-update and diagnostics


Built with React + TypeScript + Tauri.
